things.name: Zanzibar Island Day Trip
things.description: Spice island with Stone Town, Nungwi Beach and the world's finest snorkelling

things.name: National Museum of Tanzania
things.description: Zinj skull of Australopithecus boisei and the Shirazi gold collection from Kilwa

things.name: Kariakoo Market
things.description: East Africa's most vibrant wholesale market with spices, fruits and Swahili culture

things.name: Village Museum (Makumbusho)
things.description: Open-air museum with 16 traditional homesteads from different Tanzanian tribes

things.name: Serengeti & Kilimanjaro Safari
things.description: Mt Kilimanjaro climb or Serengeti wildebeest migration from the city

things.name: Msasani Peninsula Beach Clubs
things.description: Upscale coastal restaurants, bars and watersports north of the city centre

things.name: Coco Beach
things.description: Popular weekend beach on the Indian Ocean with fresh grilled seafood stalls

things.name: Askari Monument
things.description: Central WWI memorial to the African askari soldiers who fought for Germany

things.name: Nyumba ya Sanaa Craft Market
things.description: Fair-trade arts and crafts market supporting local artisans

things.name: Lutheran Church (Azania Front)
things.description: 1898 German colonial church on the waterfront - symbol of Dar es Salaam
